title: paspalum pumilum
intro: Paspalum pumilum, also known as short paspalum or dwarf paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The medicinal properties of Paspalum pumilum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, offering health benefits such as improved respiratory function and relief from congestion. Paspalum pumilum can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, and it is also used in herbal medicine to create remedies for respiratory issues.
